query: Theragenics 200 I-125 seed TG-43 anisotropy function F(1cm 0 degrees)
citations: [Monte Carlo-aided dosimetry of the theragenics TheraSeed model 200 103Pd interstitial brachytherapy seed.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/11991133/)
[Technical Note: Empirical altitude correction factors for well chamber measurements of permanent prostate and breast seed implant sources.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28730606/)
[Update of AAPM Task Group No. 43 Report: A revised AAPM protocol for brachytherapy dose calculations.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15070264/)
[Thermoluminescent dosimetry for 103Pd seeds (model 200) in solid water phantom.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/1870488/)
[Evaluation of the dose distribution for prostate implants using various 125I and 103Pd sources.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19472652/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 11991133. 2002/04/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Previous studies in the literature have measured an altitude effect for 
low-energy brachytherapy seeds; a correction factor applied in addition to PTP
evidence.source_title: Monte Carlo-aided dosimetry of the theragenics TheraSeed model 200 103Pd interstitial brachytherapy seed.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 11991133. 2002/04/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Previous studies in the literature have measured an altitude effect for 
low-energy brachytherapy seeds; a correction factor applied in addition to PTP 
to account for the breakdown of Bragg-Gray cavity theory at low energies in 
well-type ionization chambers. In clinical practice, many centers use altitude 
correction factors that are not seed-model-specific. The purpose of this work is 
to present altitude correction factors for several seed mode
evidence.search_query: Theragenics 200 I-125 seed TG-43 anisotropy function F(1cm 0 degrees)
